title: Heavy Trooper (disambiguation)
content:
The '''heavy trooper''' refers to either of the following:
*'''''[[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]]/ARC (heavy) trooper''''' - [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]
*'''''[[Clone heavy trooper]]''''' - Division of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] (from the disputed [[canon]] source [[Star Wars: Battlefront II|''Battlefront II'']]). Heavily equipped clone troopers that were primarily designed to destroy vehicles.
*'''''[[Imperial heavy trooper]]''''' - Stormtroopers with advanced armor and Force pikes.
*'''''[[Heavy Weapons Stormtrooper]]''''' - Stormtroopers armed with [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon]]s or [[DLT-19 heavy blaster rifle]]s.
*'''''[[Megablaster heavy assault trooper]]''''' - First Order Stormtroopers with web gear.

{{Stub}}
{{Disambig}}
